displayNameZh: 触及远端陌生人的三大痛点
summary: Yt Far Stranger Pains component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「触及远端陌生人的三大痛点」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-far-stranger-pains/src/YtFarStrangerPains.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtFarStrangerPains` and `ytFarStrangerPainsDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Far Stranger Pains Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-far-stranger-pains to my project. Preserve the exported YtFarStrangerPainsProps API and register the YtFarStrangerPains composition with the default props.
